title: Hitler’s Birthplace in Austria Is Now a Police Station
summary_full: The government repurposed the 17th-century building in hopes of preventing the site from becoming an attraction for Nazi sympathizers.
summary_public: The government repurposed the 17th-century building in hopes of preventing the site from becoming an attraction for Nazi sympathizers.

AT.label: positive
